name: Madras Root Vegetable Curry
recipeIngredient: 3 parsnips, peeled and cut into 1/2 x 2-inch sticks
3 carrots, peeled and cut into 1/2 x 2-inch sticks
3 turnips, peeled and cut into 1/2 x 2-inch sticks
1/2 rutabaga, peeled and cut into 1/2 x 2-inch sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat ghee in a large skillet with cover or Dutch oven until very hot.
2. Add mustard seeds and cook for about 5 seconds, until aromatic.
3. Add onions, garlic, ginger root, and chilies. Cook for 5 minutes.
4. Add the root vegetables and cook for another 5 minutes.
5. Remove pan from heat. Stir in spices, chicken stock, and tomatoes.
6. Lightly season with salt. Bring to a boil, then simmer, covered for 1 1/2 hours.
7. Serve over white or brown rice, garnished with fresh cilantro leaves.
